free_wl_unlock_condition: Legal/compliance review confirms the WL has no payment, purchase, staking, service obligation, or other consideration requirement, and public copy states eligibility limits plainly.

recommended_contracts.title: Spark Grants Program Terms
recommended_contracts.purpose: Define eligibility, application flow, selection discretion, grant scope, recipient responsibilities, revocation rights, and no-guarantee language.
must_include: Grant value, if any, and non-transferability
No guarantee of token, WL, payment, or future benefit
Jurisdiction, dispute process, and update rights

recommended_contracts.title: WL Allocation Terms
recommended_contracts.purpose: Define what a WL spot means, whether it is free, how it is allocated, and what can cause removal.
must_include: Copy rule for saying free WLs

recommended_contracts.title: Contributor Grant Agreement
recommended_contracts.purpose: Cover deliverables, contribution ownership or license, confidentiality, acceptance, payment/grant mechanics, and termination.
must_include: Payment, token, credit, or non-monetary grant handling

recommended_contracts.title: Announcement Copy Approval Sheet
recommended_contracts.purpose: Keep public Telegram/X copy aligned with contract terms before posting.

copy_rules.rule: Use Spark_coded as the initial public account unless the operator confirms BookofAgents exists, is controlled, and is ready.
Use WL spots until the WL Allocation Terms approve free WLs.
Do not mention guaranteed grants, token upside, investment returns, or automatic acceptance.
Keep contract links and CTA copy paired; if terms change, copy must be re-reviewed.
